## Incremental-change integrity

- [ ] Not an incremental change
- [ ] Desired end state is implemented across every applicable layer
- [ ] Impact matrix is complete and evidenced
- [ ] Existing responsibility was extended/replaced instead of duplicated
- [ ] Superseded artifacts were removed or have an accepted removal criterion
- [ ] Capability specifications describe the resulting current state
- [ ] Design classification and required visual evidence are complete
